prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: The Ministry of Housing, Communities and Local Government (MHCLG) primarily operates in England, and its reports and accounts are relevant only to English local governments and communities. Scotland has its own separate legislative framework and government departments for housing and local government matters.
